Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Re Punitive Damages Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT VERONICA OWEN'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Re Punitive Damages is Denied. Plaintiffs have sufficiently alleged facts to support their punitive damage claims. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
